evidence.command: bash -c test -f skills/coverage-taxonomy/GUIDE.md && grep -q "\*\*Purpose\*\*" skills/coverage-taxonomy/GUIDE.md && grep -q "\*\*Consumer\*\*" skills/coverage-taxonomy/GUIDE.md && grep -q "Authority is code" skills/coverage-taxonomy/GUIDE.md && grep -q "Update this guide" skills/coverage-taxonomy/GUIDE.md && bad=$(grep -oE "ditto coverage [a-z]+" skills/coverage-taxonomy/GUIDE.md | grep -vwE "list|add|disable|reroute|discover"); test -z "$bad" && echo HEADERS_OK_NO_INVALID_CMD || { echo "INVALID: $bad"; exit 1; }
